summary: Data Analyst and ML Engineer with 4+ years of experience scaling data operations and deploying predictive models in high-growth environments.
longBio: I specialise in bridging the gap between raw data and actionable product insights. My work focuses on building scalable machine learning pipelines, optimising data warehouses, and creating intuitive visualisations. When I'm not training models, I'm building SparkLabs, an open-source initiative focused on democratising data tools.
